channel.title: Churn Lens
channel.description: SaaS Revenue Quality & Churn Risk Due Diligence — analyzes revenue concentration, logo retention, annual plan churn risk, and MRR decline patterns to surface hidden churn before a SaaS acquisition.

item.title: Churn Lens — Buyer-Side SaaS Due Diligence | Hidden Churn & Revenue Risk
item.description: See hidden churn, concentration risk, and revenue decay before you buy a SaaS. Upload CSVs, get a buyer-side risk report in minutes.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: About Churn Lens
item.description: About Churn Lens: SaaS Revenue Quality & Churn Risk Due Diligence. Built for SaaS acquirers, PE analysts, founders evaluating SaaS businesses for purchase.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: FAQ — Churn Lens
item.description: Frequently asked questions about Churn Lens.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: Pricing — SaaS Due Diligence | Churn Lens
item.description: Upload a subscription CSV and get a comprehensive buyer-side risk report. Free tier available. Premium plans for M&A advisors and serious acquirers.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: Alternatives To — Churn Lens
item.description: Find the best alternatives compared to Churn Lens.

item.title: Vs — Churn Lens
item.description: Detailed comparisons: Churn Lens vs other tools.

item.title: Best Of — Churn Lens
item.description: The exact 47-point checklist PE analysts use before acquiring SaaS businesses. 5-minute read.

item.description: Key terms and definitions related to Churn Lens.

item.title: Who is Churn Lens For? The SaaS Acquirer's Dream Customer Profile | Churn Lens
item.description: Churn Lens is built for one specific person: the indie SaaS acquirer evaluating a $500K-$5M deal who knows they can
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: The Ultimate SaaS Due Diligence Guide (2026) — Churn Lens
item.description: The complete buyer-side SaaS due diligence guide. Master churn analysis, concentration risk, revenue quality, and deal-specific evaluation. 17+ resources organized into one comprehensive hub.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: Terms of Service — Churn Lens
item.description: Terms of Service for Churn Lens.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS Revenue Quality Score — Beyond Raw MRR | Churn Lens
item.description: The Revenue Quality Score (RQS): a composite metric that scores SaaS revenue on retention stability, concentration, expansion, payment hygiene, and contract durability.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS Revenue Concentration Risk: When Top Customers Hide Churn | Churn Lens
item.description: How revenue concentration masks churn risk in SaaS acquisitions. Learn HHI calculation, the whale customer problem, and how to detect concentration before you buy.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS Revenue Churn Calculator — Free Online Tool | Churn Lens
item.description: Free SaaS revenue churn calculator. Compute monthly churn, annual churn, NRR, logo retention, and churn-adjusted MRR from your subscription data.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS MRR Decline Analysis — Buyer-Side Revenue Decay Detection | Churn Lens
item.description: How to detect MRR decline and revenue decay in SaaS acquisition targets. Free tool analyzes trailing 12-month MRR trends, contraction rates, and churn-adjusted projections.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS Due Diligence Checklist: Buyer-Side Guide (2026) | Churn Lens
item.description: Complete buyer-side SaaS due diligence checklist. Cover churn, concentration risk, revenue quality, unit economics, and technical debt before you buy.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS Churn Rate Benchmarks by Industry (2026) | Churn Lens
item.description: Comprehensive SaaS churn rate benchmarks by industry, business model, and company stage. See how your target acquisition stacks up against industry medians.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS Buyer-Side Risk Assessment — Free Tool | Churn Lens
item.description: Free buyer-side risk assessment for SaaS acquisitions. Upload a subscription CSV and get churn risk, concentration risk, revenue decay, and quality scores in minutes.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens

item.title: SaaS Acquisition Red Flags: 12 Warning Signs for Buyers | Churn Lens
item.description: 12 specific red flags that signal a SaaS acquisition is overvalued or risky: hidden churn, concentration risk, declining NRR, annual cliffs, zombie accounts, and more.
item.dc:creator: Churn Lens
